agents.description: Runs a Python script with standard blueprint lifecycle wiring.
Runs a generated Python workflow bundle worker with blueprint-standard config/input/output handling.
Reduce/aggregator sink that completes when a configured message arrives.
Runs a native MirrorNeuron or BEAM module node with standard manifest wiring.
Emits an initial or routed message into a graph with optional state/backpressure config.
Reusable stream or polling tick source for live and replayed stream workflows.
Listens to connector-backed input skills such as Drive, Slack, webhook, socket, or WebSocket inputs.
Fans out output events or artifacts after mandatory local run-store writes.
Named LLM_CONFIG based LLM agent with optional A2A discovery metadata.
Custom OpenShell service with explicit port and SSH tunnel verification.
TCP output and web UI service using primary port 8080 and fallback port 8081.
